title: No Pickup Sounds
description: A resource pack which disables the block/item pickup sounds. That's all.
body:
Have you ever been on a multiple-hour-long mining spree and gotten tired of all the popping of items entering your inventory?

Have you ever been playing with a modpack that uses custom block/item pickup sounds only to be horrified at its obnoxious choice of a replacement for the vanilla sounds?

If so, then this very tiny resource pack is perfect for you!

No more annoying pops or plinks! Just sweet, sweet silence...

Feel free to use this in any modpacks or other Minecraft-related projects. :)
